programme.title: News Of Shenzhen
programme.desc: Presented as a leisurely variety show, the program revolves around the theme: 'Seek Paradise Along the Journey to Kunlun Mountain.' Throughout their travels, the adventurers will uncover lesser-known towns, each exuding its own unique charm. They will explore the distinctive characteristics of these hidden gems, savoring every street and lane, as well as every bite and sip. This immersive experience seeks to rediscover the essence of life, allowing our weary hearts to shine anew amidst the dust of daily grind.

programme.title: Silent Night, Fatal Night
programme.desc: Famous mystery writer Victoria Rollins is presumed dead until her social-media page announces her new novel. But when a fan tries to confirm the author's existence, she's flung into a deadly web of lies.

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: From Seoul to Busan, this spectacular eating show takes place at famous bakeries/patisseries to give the dessert lovers the glimpse of tasty goodness of some of the most-coveted desserts of all.

programme.title: E10 - Judi And Tom
programme.desc: Judi and Tom have always loved boating and spending time on the water, but their large oceanside family home is no longer fit for their needs and they're looking to downsize.

programme.title: E17 - Skirt Steak With Salsa Verde
programme.desc: Rachael's friend, author Anna Gass, demonstrates how to make an Italian potato and horseradish frittata, a traditional snack from the Basilicata region of Italy.

programme.title: E18 - Barbecue Salmon & Zupa Ogorkowa
programme.desc: Chef Deborah creates a flavourful party menu featuring zupa ogorkowa, a Polish dill pickle chowder, and Kansas City-style barbecue salmon with biscuits. She smokes the salmon, then prepares a pickle soup.

programme.desc: Rachael shows how to make a fun and delicious beef fajita dinner cooked a la plancha. The beef is marinated in a spicy sauce, served on charred tortillas and accompanied by a platter of bean-dip nachos.

programme.title: E42
programme.desc: The 114th drama serial follows two women, Rin (Mikami Ai) and Naomi (Kosaka Juri), who paved the way for nursing in the Meiji era. Each carries her own struggles, yet together they support one another as they race to protect the wounded and vulnerable, often standing up against powerful forces. Through conflicts and hardships, the two gradually grow. No matter which way the wind blows, this unconventional duo continues their journey in search of happiness.

programme.title: E105
programme.desc: Masaharu (Tamayama Tetsuji), who travels alone to Scotland to learn the art of whisky making, meets Ellie (Charlotte Kate Fox) and falls in love. Masaharu dreams of creating Japan's first domestically produced whisky, while Ellie, who has left her homeland and come to Japan for the first time, faces a series of challenges. This is the story of love and adventure as Massan and Ellie, united by the strength of their bond, through a turbulent era with unwavering resolve.

programme.title: E803
programme.desc: Sayali desires a fairytale romance, but fate intertwines her with Sachin, a complex figure. Will her dreams of a perfect life survive this unexpected connection?

programme.title: E5173
programme.desc: Dr. Abhimanyu, a misogynist, falls for Akshara, their daughter. Complications arise when Akshara's half-sister, Arohi, also falls for him.

programme.title: E2029
programme.desc: Anupamaa sacrifices her ambitions for family, feeling uncredited. She finds empowerment by living on her terms after trials, showcasing a dramatic journey of resilience and independence.

programme.title: E301 - 2
programme.desc: Time flew by, yet Tulsi Virani stood strong as the Sarvagunn matriarch! Can she navigate the challenges of modern-day parenting and relationships?

programme.title: E917
programme.desc: Jhanak, determined to keep her mother's vow, embarks on a life-changing path. Facing hardships and loss, she encounters a man who adds a new layer of complexity to her journey.

programme.title: Arts24
programme.desc: Culture news from the world's art, food, and fashion capital, Paris, bringing you the latest trends, exhibitions, culinary innovations, and style movements that continue to shape global taste and creativity.

programme.title: The Knockout Cone Snail
programme.desc: Hungry cone snails use their siphons to sniff out fish and worms to eat. When they find their prey, they release a cocktail of drugs that knocks them out, making them easy to catch.

programme.title: A Special Surprise
programme.desc: Figure skaters Josh and Kloe are off to an important tournament. But will Kloe's injured ankle heal in time? Back in Nottingham, Kiara's dad is about to reveal a very big secret. And brothers Rais and Aren are getting competitive on the ice hockey rink.

programme.title: Trip to Bhutan
programme.desc: Zoe and Milo wish each other a happy New Year when Alim arrives and wishes them a happy birthday. Confused, they follow him to Bhutan, where their friend Dorji explains that in this Himalayan country, everyone turns a year older on New Year's Day.

programme.title: The Mystery of the Fairy Frog
programme.desc: Addison's and Tess's fairy garden school project attracts a mysterious glowing frog, and while Alex thinks it's radioactive and Tess believes it's a magical fairy frog, Addison is determined to find the real answer to this amphibious mystery.

programme.title: Short Circuits
programme.desc: Smorph is finding it hard to finish his painting in the dark and his lamp is not working properly. Perhaps it has a short circuit that needs fixing?

programme.title: The Flying Fish
programme.desc: Anabella creates a giant fish sculpture. Could Anabella's kooky fish really fly? She is sure it can but flying experts Oto and Mundi have their doubts. They head to a ‘birdman' competition in California, USA to try to turn the crazy creation into a flying machine!

programme.title: Seabirds
programme.desc: During the race, Kit and Mr. Battery will use the wings of various seabirds.

programme.title: The Undersea Cable
programme.desc: An internet malfunction leads Kit to a bitten data cable at the bottom of the sea.

programme.title: Trip to Ukraine
programme.desc: Summer is over for Zoe and Milo, and they're not looking forward to going back to school. But Alim jumps in and wishes them... a happy back-to-school day! And to prove to them it really does exist and truly is a joyful day, our friends embark on a journey to Ukraine.

programme.title: The Flying Fish
programme.desc: Anabella creates a giant fish sculpture. Could Anabella's kooky fish really fly? She is sure it can but flying experts Oto and Mundi have their doubts. They head to a ‘birdman' competition in California, USA to try to turn the crazy creation into a flying machine!

programme.title: Home Improvement
programme.desc: While the Ostrich family swims, Munki, Trunk, and Rocky play fetch and destroy their nest. They try to rebuild it but get carried away. Just before the ostriches return, their mega-nest collapses, and they must quickly fix the mess to avoid trouble.

programme.title: Blowing Bubbles
programme.desc: Luna and Jupiter are in the backyard blowing bubbles when they find themselves wondering, why are bubbles always round?

programme.title: Little Trumpet
programme.desc: Boom should guess what Reds draw on the floor.

programme.title: The Flying Fish
programme.desc: Anabella creates a giant fish sculpture. Could Anabella's kooky fish really fly? She is sure it can but flying experts Oto and Mundi have their doubts. They head to a ‘birdman' competition in California, USA to try to turn the crazy creation into a flying machine!

programme.title: Federica the Turtle
programme.desc: Federica, the turtle, has arrived from Italy after a run-in with a container ship. Loro Parque has offered to be her ‘forever home', but how will she go sharing her new digs with others? Esmeralda, the iguana, has a lumpy belly and Jorge, the vet, is worried.

programme.title: Seabirds
programme.desc: During the race, Kit and Mr. Battery will use the wings of various seabirds.

programme.title: The Undersea Cable
programme.desc: An internet malfunction leads Kit to a bitten data cable at the bottom of the sea.

programme.title: Game Over
programme.desc: Flippy's having the worst day-until a short-circuit at the cafe turns his world into a video game! Now he has three lives per level and total control. It's the escape he wanted... or is it? Even in games, you have to face challenges. What happens if he runs out of lives?

programme.title: Crusty Bogies!
programme.desc: How are bogies made? With the help of a supersized nose, the doctors make their own! We follow Dr Ronx on a busy hospital shift and Gladiator Dynamite kicks off a foot Body Battle!

programme.title: The Day Henry Met...a Chariot
programme.desc: Today Henry meets a Roman Chariot in a museum. He becomes a Roman Centurion so he can take part in an epic chariot race!

programme.title: Tori Boggs: Jump Rope Champion
programme.desc: Tori Boggs holds the GUINNESS WORLD RECORDS title for the most frog double under skips in thirty seconds. The legendary jump roper shows how her record-breaking skipping skills helped her become the best in the world.

programme.title: Crusty Bogies!
programme.desc: How are bogies made? With the help of a supersized nose, the doctors make their own! We follow Dr Ronx on a busy hospital shift and Gladiator Dynamite kicks off a foot Body Battle!

programme.title: The Survivor (Bear Grylls) and The Boss (Ursula Burns)
programme.desc: In this episode of Becoming Xtraordinary, Bear Grylls shares his story of perseverance and how he became 'the world's best known survival expert', while Ursula Burns reflects on her journey to becoming the first Black woman CEO of a Fortune 500 company.

programme.title: The Future Is: Hands-free Driving
programme.desc: European engineering firms are developing a new technology that allows cars to drive you instead of you driving them. The so-called 'road train system' consists of a lead truck and vehicles that are linked to it.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Kaiko and Will try to examine a glowing fish but fall under its spell. Ant and Fontaine must rescue their parents, wearing blindfolds.

programme.title: Critical Examination
programme.desc: Robyn and Nyatepe help transfer a sick lion into a mobile high-tech scanner unit for a critical examination. Josh and Molly are checking the competitors in a posh horse trial for signs of injury and illness. And Jamie and Bonte are helping with Leo's leg surgery.

programme.title: An Oldie but a Gooey
programme.desc: Darwin and Newts meet Pupu Rangi's grandma, Kuia Gooey, and discover there's so much that our grandparents can teach us.

E17 - The Sharing Badge
programme.desc: Duggee and the Squirrels bake a pie and learn how to share by dividing things between them

programme.title: E12 - Cauliflower
programme.desc: It's Cauliflower creaking away as she grows and sings her catchy 'Cauliflower Creak' song.

programme.title: E11 - Chilli Peppers
programme.desc: It's the bagpipe playing Chilli Peppers performing their song 'We're Chilli When It's Hot'

programme.title: E16 - Robotato
programme.desc: Evil Pea has trapped Supertato and replaced him with an evil robot lookalike called Robotato.

programme.title: E17 - Three Peas In A Pod
programme.desc: Supertato and the Tato Team face a trio of Evil Peas when Mummy Pea and Daddy Pea come to visit Evil Pea. They vow to help her take over the supermarket once and for all.

programme.title: E5 - Robot
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say 'robot' and we go on a whirlwind word adventure.

programme.title: E22 - Whale Watching
programme.desc: Bluey promises her customer, Bingo, the best tour ever in a game of Whale Watching, but they need Mum and Dad to join in, and they are too tired to play after a late night.

programme.title: E21 - Tina
programme.desc: Tired of being told what to do, Bluey and Bingo enlist their giant invisible friend Tina to show Mum and Dad who's boss. Now they can do anything they want, until Mum and Dad rebel.

programme.title: E16 - The Rollercoaster Badge
programme.desc: The Squirrels build the best rollercoaster anyone ever saw. From a sweet song, to spinning through a helix, and getting the full G-force, it's a ride Duggee's going to remember!

programme.title: E19 - The Show
programme.desc: When Bingo drops Mum's breakfast-in-bed on the floor, she's convinced she's ruined her big day. But Bluey helps make amends by putting on a play of how Mum and Dad first met.

programme.title: E42 - The Organising Badge
programme.desc: Roly is trying to force a very large plastic ball into the bin, but it flies out and crashes into a tower that Betty has built.

programme.title: E1 - Hollywood, USA
programme.desc: Glitch is not happy when he has to work with Kyan in a Hollywood film.

programme.title: E3 - Bubbles
programme.desc: Stanley cleans Cynthia's bus, but each time he does it keeps getting dirty again. It's so dirty by the end, he invents a super-duper cleaning machine that makes a sea of bubbles.

programme.title: E2 - House
programme.desc: Myrtle's aunt Cressy is coming to stay, and she needs Stanley to make her a bed for her. This escalates into Stanley building her a whole set of rooms outside Myrtles actual house.

programme.title: E18 - Rain
programme.desc: When a heavy summer rain thunders over the Heeler home, Bluey is determined to dam the water in the front yard, while Mum tries to stop her constantly tracking mud into the house.

programme.title: E18 - The History Badge
programme.desc: The Squirrels get an interactive history lesson from Duggee and a host of famous faces.

programme.title: E17 - The Sharing Badge
programme.desc: Duggee and the Squirrels bake a pie and learn how to share by dividing things between them

programme.title: E22 - Ping Pong Penguins
programme.desc: What's that bouncy, pingy, whacking sound? It's the Penguins playing ping-pong!

programme.title: E12 - Cauliflower
programme.desc: It's Cauliflower creaking away as she grows and sings her catchy 'Cauliflower Creak' song.

programme.title: E11 - Chilli Peppers
programme.desc: It's the bagpipe playing Chilli Peppers performing their song 'We're Chilli When It's Hot'

programme.title: E16 - Robotato
programme.desc: Evil Pea has trapped Supertato and replaced him with an evil robot lookalike called Robotato.

programme.title: E17 - Three Peas In A Pod
programme.desc: Supertato and the Tato Team face a trio of Evil Peas when Mummy Pea and Daddy Pea come to visit Evil Pea. They vow to help her take over the supermarket once and for all.

programme.title: E10 - Rise Of The Vacubots
programme.desc: Messy goes to OKIDO to find out why vacuum cleaners are so noisy and inadvertently releases a huge swarm of Vacubot 2000s across OKIDO City!

programme.title: E26 - Mojo Draws The Line
programme.desc: Mojo and Bo were supposed to paint fresh lines on the street. But when they get into a race with Tao, the paint goes in every direction, causing wild traffic chaos.

programme.desc: When Dad's accused of fluffing in Bluey's face as he climbed out of bed, he's put on trial with Mum as the judge, and Bluey and Bingo as witnesses. Bluey might also have to explain what she was doing there.

E37
programme.desc: 程家女名少商，因戰亂自幼被父母留在祖母身邊成為“留守兒童”，嬸孃狼心縱容，意圖將其養成廢人。面對重重陷阱，程少商（趙露思飾）為活命，假荒誕、真苦學，掩蓋鋒芒等待父母歸來。可撥開烏雲見月明時，卻因多年疏離致使親情已難再拾。缺愛的程少商，遇新帝義子凌不疑（吳磊飾）、白鹿山才子袁慎、世家子弟樓垚，三人各有優劣。在選擇適婚者上，程少商既自卑又務實，儘管情感之路頗多坎坷，但她從不後悔自己的每次選擇。在與凌不疑的相處之中，也陰差陽錯捲入了凌不疑的家庭與身世之謎中。種種事件，程少商屢立奇功，也從凌不疑的家庭關係中學會與父母相處之道，以及如何經營自己的愛情。同時程少商與凌不疑也在這些經歷中各自變化成長，慢慢與自己和家庭和解，並堅守內心的正義，攜手化解國家危機，成就一段佳話。

programme.title: E34
programme.desc: 潘岩(郭麒麟 飾)在機緣巧合下進入榮柯律所實習，認識了高冷女神左娜(金晨 飾)、學霸舒一南(晏紫東 飾)等一批年輕人。他們在資深前輩易帆(朱珠飾)、杜飛宇(張子賢飾)等人的帶領下，經歷了職場的波折坎坷和困難考驗，一起並肩作戰，互相學習成長，憑著熱情拼搏的職場精神，在情與法、義與利的境地裡突圍，更堅定了對法律的崇高信仰，同時也對自身的突破與飛躍有了新的認識與感悟，於職場和生活的路上守望初心，在平凡中創造不凡的「奮逗」故事。

programme.desc: 潘岩(郭麒麟 飾)在機緣巧合下進入榮柯律所實習，認識了高冷女神左娜(金晨 飾)、學霸舒一南(晏紫東 飾)等一批年輕人。他們在資深前輩易帆(朱珠飾)、杜飛宇(張子賢飾)等人的帶領下，經歷了職場的波折坎坷和困難考驗，一起並肩作戰，互相學習成長，憑著熱情拼搏的職場精神，在情與法、義與利的境地裡突圍，更堅定了對法律的崇高信仰，同時也對自身的突破與飛躍有了新的認識與感悟，於職場和生活的路上守望初心，在平凡中創造不凡的「奮逗」故事。

programme.title: E1 - We’re back
programme.desc: TV's most savage social experiment returns as Search4Hurt starts its mission to find the fittest everyday Aussies to join their hybrid sporting team, starting with HurtCamp.

programme.title: E1 - Black Bear & Wild Rice
programme.desc: Daniel takes on the profound challenge of a bear hunt with fellow hunter and houndsman Sam. He also explores traditional methods for harvesting delicious wild rice with Arthur, Avani and Sara.

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: When Dick Cabela founded “Cabela’s”, he was unaware that it was to become the foremost outfitting store in the world. So it is fitting that his son is on a quest to explore the Hard Truths of conservation. Join Dan Cabela on this high-impact journey of discovery as he uncovers some of lesser known facts in the conservation world. In particular, the role that hunting and the utilization of wildlife can play as a modern day conservation tool.

programme.title: It's Showtime[Live]
programme.desc: The venue for Pinoys to strut and display their unique talents for all the world to see. Led by a powerhouse cast of popular celebrities - Vhong Navarro, Anne Curtis, Ogie Alcasid, Karylle, Jhong Hilario and Vice Ganda to name a few.

programme.title: The Alibi[Live]
programme.desc: Vincent, an heir to a news empire, gets accused of killing his rival, Walter. To protect his reputation, he hires Stella, an escort with her own haunted past, to pose as his alibi. What begins as a transactional arrangement soon becomes dangerously real as their shared wounds and ambitions draw them together. But when they uncover the truth, the two are compelled to confront their true feelings.

programme.title: The Secrets Of Hotel 88[Live]
programme.desc: Two estranged families reunite at the reopening of Hotel 88, until the former bestfriends behind it are found dead. Forced to share the inheritance, their children uncover buried secrets and the truth behind their father's mysterious deaths.

programme.title: Incognito
programme.desc: Private Military Contractors (PMCs) engage in high-stakes tasks daily, with many skilled Filipino soldiers involved. Incognito follows ex-soldiers on covert missions, blending intense action with themes of honor, love, and redemption.

programme.title: The Iron Heart
programme.desc: The Iron Heart follows Apollo Adelantar, an undercover operative with a traumatic past who is assigned to infiltrate a powerful crime syndicate. As he goes deeper into his dangerous mission, Apollo is forced to confront painful truths about his identity, loyalty, and family-especially when trusted allies turn into enemies. Fueled by vengeance, justice, and his desire to protect the innocent, Apollo and his companions face relentless trials that test not only their strength but also their moral convictions.

programme.desc: ABS-CBN's flagship newscast and the country's leading news program in the past two decades, anchored by the most celebrated news team ever assembled in the history of Philippine broadcasting.

programme.title: Always Be My Maybe
programme.desc: Two heartbroken strangers, Jake and Tintin, meet after failed relationships and form a friendship that helps them heal. As they support each other in moving on, they unexpectedly find themselves falling in love.

programme.title: 2 Good 2 Be True[Live]
programme.desc: Ali, a hardworking nurse with big dreams, crosses paths with Eloy, a clever mechanic secretly living a double life as a con artist and law student. Their rocky first meeting leads to an unexpected partnership involving a wealthy old man, hidden identities, family secrets, and emotional healing. As love grows amid deception, the series explores trust, redemption, and second chances, blending romance, comedy, and drama.

Inner Senses
programme.desc: Yan always sees dead people. Jim, her psychologist, thinks it's all in her mind brought by loneliness and by unpleasant experiences of past relationships. He devotes all his time to curing her. Jim soon falls in love as Yan is freed of her vision. But then he starts seeing dead people too. Jim remembers his past. His girlfriend in high school, named Yu, committed suicide when Jim tried to break up with her in twenty years ago. Now, with Yan's help and love, can Jim face up to the ghost and end the nightmare?

programme.title: The Movie Star Says -Manfred Wong (Part2)
programme.desc: Since veteran filmmaker Manfred Wong joined the film industry since 1970s and worked for numerous Hong Kong companies at the position from scriptwriter, Head of Promotions to film producer, he has now been the best guide bringing us to travel through a sense of nostalgia for the old days of Hong Kong cinema. In this programme, he tells refinedly that there was a strife between Cantonese and Mandarin movies in 50s and 60s while fierce competitions amongst different film production companies over decades; also how various film companies manifested in the 90s golden era of Hong Kong movies.

programme.title: Iceman Cometh
programme.desc: Yuen Biao and Yuen Wah are two Ming Dynasty adversaries who topple into an ice chasm, only to be thawed out in modern day Hong Kong.

programme.title: Last Hero In China
programme.desc: Wong Fei Hong investigates why lots of village girls have gone missing and discovers that it's organised by the law enforcer. A big fight ensures between Wong and the bad guys...

programme.title: E297 - Blood Is Thicker Than Grease / Don't Make Me Laugh
programme.desc: Plankton's family open their own restaurant...directly next to the Chum Bucket. // SpongeBob suddenly finds everything funny...much to everyone's annoyance.

programme.title: E105 - Mar-Snoop
programme.desc: On her quest to get her own Marsupilami, Bibi encounters a Jaguar which scares her enough to give up the hunt.

programme.title: E206 - Cruel Summer
programme.desc: Max and Phoebe are working well as a team, until he is accused of committing crimes and Phoebe must apprehend him. Now on the lam, Max learns that the Mastermind's henchman is secretly controlling his actions via a chip in his neck.

programme.title: E210 - Get Rod
programme.desc: No one likes Rod, especially the Turtles! Bishop's former intern keeps trying to kidnap them and steal their mutant blood, but when Rod himself is kidnapped... Mikey is on the case! His first suspect: the mutant-hating Mechazoid maker BISHOP.

programme.title: E101 - Jade the Juggler / Parcel Chase
programme.desc: Jade tries to help too many people and ends up causing chaos in the process! // The Twins ask the Marsupilamis to wait for an important parcel, but they miss it, so try and retrieve it from the depot.

programme.title: E233 - Whale Watching / Krusty Kleaners
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs hires Squidward to babysit Pearl for the night, but she just wants to sneak out to a cool teen party! // After spilling a milkshake during a delivery, SpongeBob vows to return and clean the entire building!

programme.title: E271 - Something Narwhal This Way Comes
programme.desc: Two familiar faces from SpongeBob's past visit Bikini Bottom, but they bring a big problem along with them.

programme.title: E103 - Dance Off / The show must go on
programme.desc: Jade's a great dancer which results in her facing Mr Best for dance off in person. // Mica and Jade put on a play to win their school a prize, but forget a key prop so the Marsups step in to help.

programme.title: E111 - The Butterfly Effect / The Green House
programme.desc: After spilling an experiment of Lisa's, Lincoln sets off a chain reaction that unravels the household. // In an effort to be more energy-efficient Lincoln rallies his family to stop using so much electricity.

programme.title: E105 - Canteen Carnage
programme.desc: Marcel gets a job as the school chef after Jade causes the usual one to quit.

programme.title: E201 - The Max of Life
programme.desc: Missing fame and fans, Max decides to recapture some glory by breaking Booch's sandwich-stacking record at Splat by the Sea, but Chloe challenges him so that her friend can have her record back.

programme.title: E310 - Deal Me Out / Friendzy
programme.desc: Lincoln and Clyde worry that they may be too old to still be playing Ace Savvy. // Lincoln discovers that having a friend over means getting special privileges and he takes advantage of that.

programme.title: E111 - The Butterfly Effect / The Green House
programme.desc: After spilling an experiment of Lisa's, Lincoln sets off a chain reaction that unravels the household. // In an effort to be more energy-efficient Lincoln rallies his family to stop using so much electricity.

programme.title: E904 - Pet Project / Cuff Break
programme.desc: When Mom and the twins win a raffle to spend a weekend at a resort, Lana struggles to leave her pets behind. // After Lincoln tests a magic trick on Grouse, they get handcuffed together and Grouse has to spend the day at middle school.

programme.title: E111 - Where There's a Will, There's a Way / Lost in the Sauce
programme.desc: When the house AC breaks during an extreme heat wave, Will takes it upon himself to protect his family and fix it. // Ellie insists on running Raven Club like a dictatorship, so Jack & Lil quit, and Ellie must save her investigation AND best friends.

programme.title: E298 - Momageddon / Pet the Rock
programme.desc: The Krusty Krew get lazy when their moms take over the Krusty Krab. // Patrick's new pet rock catches the eye of a mischievous rock collector.

programme.title: E105 - Canteen Carnage
programme.desc: Marcel gets a job as the school chef after Jade causes the usual one to quit.

E105 - Tiny Croc / Camping Croc
programme.desc: Daisy and Mr. Crocodile find a tiny lizard who wants to be just like Mr. Crocodile. // Winston tries to be the leader on a nature hike, but his high-tech gadget gets everyone lost in the woods.

programme.title: E113 - The Kittens
programme.desc: Barbabelle watches Bali's kittens. She's scared something will happen and won't let them out. Barbamama must intervene to help the kittens.

programme.title: E104 - Boots
programme.desc: Tim tries out some new rocket boots which soon fly out of control.

programme.title: E302 - Unicornasaurus / The Grumple Games
programme.desc: Dora helps Benny and Uni the Unicornasaurus get their magic paintbrush back so he can be reunited with his pet, Bunnicorn. // Dora teams up with Hearty the Grumple so she can finally compete in the Grumple Games.

programme.title: E118 - Clock And Dance / Barbapileup
programme.desc: The barbababies prepare a show for Barbamama's birthday. While Barbalala finishes up, they go to the carnival where Barbabeau gets stuck in an attraction. // Three separate stories telescope into a big final bouquet in the middle of the courtyard.

programme.title: E122 - Barbabright Has A Secret / Super Duper Cool
programme.desc: Barbabright acts strangely. What is he hiding ? The Barbabbabies will do anything to find out. // The Barbapapa decide to save energy. But their efforts are undermined by Barbabright and Barbabelle who build a secret energy-consuming project.

programme.title: E123 - Barba TV / The Museum
programme.desc: The barbababies are glued to the TV. Since they love it so much, their parents encourage them to make their own shows. // The Barbapapa visit the museum of evolution. On the program: creation of the Earth, Precambrian submarine and... dinosaurs!

programme.title: E204 - The Crew Builds Library Treasure Tunnels / The Crew Builds A Super Snack Di
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew's favorite book series has new additions! But when there's no room for them in the library, the pups have to get creative.// The pups have a surprise just for Rubble... a snack dispenser! But will they finish it before Rubble finds out?

programme.title: E205 - The Crew Builds A Hair Salon / The Crew Builds A Colorful Crystal Show
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew build a hair salon just in time for Grandpa Gravel's special photo-until they run into a squirrely shampoo setback! / Motor and Lily make a shiny discovery worth celebrating... with the coolest light show the pups have ever seen!

programme.title: E115 - The Ant Hill / Redbeard The Elf Pirate
programme.desc: Things start to go missing all over the kingdom, and Ben & Holly realise that ants are stealing their possessions. // Barnaby Elf's uncle Redbeard has lost all his treasure, prompting Holly & Ben to follow the clues in an effort to track it down.

programme.title: E204 - Dinerstore
programme.desc: Tim and Tommy help out at the DinerStore.

programme.title: E123 - Barba TV / The Museum
programme.desc: The barbababies are glued to the TV. Since they love it so much, their parents encourage them to make their own shows. // The Barbapapa visit the museum of evolution. On the program: creation of the Earth, Precambrian submarine and... dinosaurs!

programme.title: E116 - Trouble At The Truck Wash
programme.desc: When an overeager Crusher causes the Truck Wash to explode out into Axle City, Blaze and friends will need your help using angles to recover the pieces and get the trucks clean again!

programme.title: E501 - Potato City
programme.desc: Peppa and her family visit a new theme park that has a vegetable theme.

programme.title: E116 - Tadpoles / Cows
programme.desc: Holly takes frogspawn home to look after, but is shocked the following morning to discover it has turned into tadpoles. // The children visit the Big Farm to find out where milk comes from.

programme.title: E113 - The Crew Builds A Dinosaur Museum / The Crew Builds A Wheelchair Ramp
programme.desc: After uncovering dinosaur bones, the pups decide to build a dinosaur museum! // When Omar the Mail Carrier breaks his foot, it's up to the pups to make sure he can still deliver the mail by building ramps all over town.

programme.title: E713 - Pups Save A Lost Gold Miner / Pups Save Uncle Otis From His Cabin
programme.desc: Uncle Otis takes a trip to a lost gold mine. After wandering off course, Ryder and the Pups must save him from the booby-trapped mine. // Uncle Otis's installs a Smart Home 3000, in his cabin, that ends up trapping Uncle Otis and Mr. Wingnut inside!

programme.title: E112 - The Cave Barbapapas / The Little Monsters
programme.desc: The barbababies discover a strange cave. Barbalib tells the story of the caves Barbapapa and how they transformed. // The Barbababies have a sleepover in the living room. Fearing the monsters in the closet, they set up wacky traps to catch them.

programme.title: E101 - Balloon
programme.desc: Tia's new balloon gets stuck in a tree, so Tim tries to get it down.

programme.title: E109 - The Unidentified Shiny Object / The Case Of The Crying Monkey
programme.desc: Mysterious lights are messing up the dancing at the firefly prom. // The duo follows the jungle sounds to locate a baby monkey.

programme.desc: Mummy Pig and Daddy Pig discover how fun scooters are.

programme.title: E1 - Will Hawaii Sink La
programme.desc: Liz and Martin travel to the tropical paradise of Hawaii to investigate how evidence of catastrophic events in its geological past revealed a pattern of destruction.

programme.title: E3 - Cheating Time
programme.desc: Throughout history, men have built empires and held the lives of millions in their hands, but the one thing they couldn't conquer was death.

programme.title: E6 - Fireplace Bellows, Calissons, And Diving Watercraft
programme.desc: Find out how fireplace bellows, calissons, and diving watercrafts are made.

programme.title: E8 - Secrets Of The Alien Signals
programme.desc: When NASA begins a strange experiment to communicate with dolphins, experts investigate if it's a prelude to making alien contact.

programme.title: E8 - Earths Death Orbit
programme.desc: Earth's journey through the universe is a perilous one, and new discoveries reveal that our planet is heading toward a mysterious area of the cosmos.

programme.title: E1 - A Super Fun Underwater Sing-Along!
programme.desc: Get ready for a super fun underwater sing-along with The Sharksons! Join the fun as five little reef sharks learn their lesson about jumping on the bed. Then, meet an 'Itsy Bitsy' sea spider who keeps trying to climb an underwater cliff with a little help from her friends! The classic rhymes continue with a curious crab acting out the story of Humpty Dumpty & a cozy pajama party with ten friends in a bed. It's a sing-along full of classic tunes with a fun, fishy twist!

programme.title: E2 - Sweet Dreams & Bedtime Songs!
programme.desc: Get ready for sweet dreams & bedtime songs! Mummy helps Mia begin her nighttime routine by tucking her toys into cozy spaces. Then, they try out some super simple & calming animal-related yoga poses to help Mia have a restful sleep. Daddy also shows Mia that routines can be fun with his 'brush your teeth dance'! Finally, Mummy & Daddy play a beautiful lullaby on their guitars to help soothe the kids to sleep under the twinkling stars.

programme.title: E4 - JJ's Guide to Staying Healthy!
programme.desc: Join JJ for a guide to staying healthy & happy! The learning starts with hygiene, as JJ & his friends learn the importance of washing their hands & how to scrub-a-dub-dub in the bath. Then, it's time for some big milestones! Sing along as JJ learns to use the potty & TomTom learns what happens when you lose a tooth. Plus, join the Melon Patch kids as they visit the doctor for a checkup & learn that it's nothing to be afraid of!

programme.title: E1 - When Buster Becomes a Superhero!
programme.desc: Watch as Buster becomes a real-life superhero! When a storm starts during a nature walk, everyone panics, but it's up to brave Buster to lead them all safely home through the rain & wind. Then, Buster wants to be an emergency vehicle. He gets his chance to be a hero when he's guarding the fire station & a fire breaks out! It's up to Buster the hero fire truck to save the day. From flying like Super Buster to rescuing a kitten, he's always a hero!

programme.title: E2 - JJ's Fun Home Learning Adventures!
programme.desc: Join JJ for some fun learning adventures at home! First, TomTom leads his lab assistants JJ & YoYo in some amazing science experiments, from making slime to building an erupting volcano! Then, it's time to head to the kitchen, where YoYo teaches JJ how to make the perfect peanut butter & jelly sandwich. The at-home fun continues as the kids discover a cassette player & record all the cool sounds they hear around the house!

programme.title: E1 - A Super Fun Underwater Sing-Along!
programme.desc: Get ready for a super fun underwater sing-along with The Sharksons! Join the fun as five little reef sharks learn their lesson about jumping on the bed. Then, meet an 'Itsy Bitsy' sea spider who keeps trying to climb an underwater cliff with a little help from her friends! The classic rhymes continue with a curious crab acting out the story of Humpty Dumpty & a cozy pajama party with ten friends in a bed. It's a sing-along full of classic tunes with a fun, fishy twist!

programme.title: E2 - When Everything Goes Hilariously Wrong!
programme.desc: Get ready to laugh as everything goes hilariously wrong for Kii & Yii & their friends! The chaos starts when Robot creates a jelly-making machine, but it goes haywire & he ends up stuck inside a giant wobbly jelly! Then, Princess Cat puts way too much soap in her washing machine, causing it to overflow & fill her entire castle with bubbles! From a wobbly tooth to a picky eater, it's one funny problem after another!

When a storm starts during a nature walk, everyone panics, but it's up to brave Buster to lead them all safely home through the rain & wind. Then, Buster wants to be an emergency vehicle. He gets his chance to be a hero when he's guarding the fire station & a fire breaks out! It's up to Buster the hero fire truck to save the day. From flying like Super Buster to rescuing a kitten, he's always a hero!

programme.title: E1 - When Buster Becomes a Superhero!

programme.title: E1 - A Super Fun Underwater Sing-Along!
programme.desc: Get ready for a super fun underwater sing-along with The Sharksons! Join the fun as five little reef sharks learn their lesson about jumping on the bed. Then, meet an 'Itsy Bitsy' sea spider who keeps trying to climb an underwater cliff with a little help from her friends! The classic rhymes continue with a curious crab acting out the story of Humpty Dumpty & a cozy pajama party with ten friends in a bed. It's a sing-along full of classic tunes with a fun, fishy twist!

programme.title: E7 - A French Visit
programme.desc: Rivard has a meeting in his office with the members of the FLA. On the internet, a video showing Karine slapping Hamelin goes viral, just as the French president is visiting Quebec. Tension mounts between Hamelin and the latter...

programme.title: Tendance XXI S12
programme.desc: French creativity is booming in the fields of fashion, crafts, design, beauty and gastronomy. 'Tendance XXI' showcases a know-how that evolves in tune with the times, sometimes even anticipating them.

programme.title: Un Si Grand Soleil S8
programme.desc: The Bastide, Estrela, Salama, Levy, Berville and Alami families, plus a host of supporting characters, live and work in the modern everyday city of Montpellier, in southern France. programme.title: E9 - Restored Buildings
programme.desc: We visit two couples whose love and hard work have helped give a second life to an old school in Sherbrooke and we discover an abandoned church in Harrington. And we meet a stained-glass artist, real architecture with light.

programme.title: E46 - The Tennis Racket
programme.desc: Watches, speakers, toilets... Maestro takes a fascinating look at some of our most everyday objects, both old and new. How exactly to they work? What is their history?

programme.title: E24 - Here's An Armadillo
programme.desc: At 6 years old the cheerful mischievous Koumi dreams of knowing all the animals in the world. Thanks to her picture book, she's able to head off and meet them.

programme.title: E2 - 9-1-1 On A 911
programme.desc: When one client brings in a perfectly running, near flawless Porsche, and the other a brand new Cadillac CTS-V, the only thing left to do is everything!

programme.title: E7 - Hold Me Closer Tiny Lancer
programme.desc: A car designer believes his custom-built concept car is worth $250,000. Addison reviews a drag-racing 1967 Chevelle.

programme.title: E12 - New Wings Over Alaska
programme.desc: Join the unconventional Tweto family as they continue to transport life's necessities to one of the most remote and extreme regions of America.

programme.title: E3 - Big Sur Modern Retreat
programme.desc: A nature-loving architect plans to build a one-of-a-kind modern cabin deep in the California Redwoods that will rival the jaw-dropping views of nearby Big Sur!

programme.desc: The sound, smell and charisma of a two-stroke is what every motorcyclist wants. But, this type of ride is almost extinct, Zack and Ari investigate.

programme.title: E6 - Best Of'
programme.desc: A collection of the best moments from across the series. What were Turbo Pickers Paul Cowland's and Dave Southall's premier auto picks?

programme.title: E2 - Under Pressure
programme.desc: As food and water become scarce, Crystal, the fierce leader of the Ruins gang, sets her sights on rival Kati’s territory and its neighboring fruit trees. Watch as Crystal’s move and a raid by outside invaders lead to dire consequences for one troop.

programme.title: E1 - Family
programme.desc: Every empire needs a succession plan. Making babies – and raising them – is crucial for every species to survive. In some social circles, it takes a village to raise a family. In others, a single parent is all that stands between the vulnerability of youth and the threats of the wild.

programme.title: E4 - Sidekicks
programme.desc: Unravel strange alliances that ensure mutual success in the wild. Explore the partnership between clownfish and anemones, watch oxpeckers keep savannah residents healthy, and review the quid-pro-poo agreements of dung beetles and pitcher plants.

programme.title: E1 - Battle Lines
programme.desc: As the dry season approaches, tensions rise on Lemur Island, both between rival gangs and within their own ranks. Get a view from the battlefield as the female leaders fiercely defend their turf, while their newborn infants cling to them for safety.

programme.title: E2 - Under Pressure
programme.desc: As food and water become scarce, Crystal, the fierce leader of the Ruins gang, sets her sights on rival Kati’s territory and its neighboring fruit trees. Watch as Crystal’s move and a raid by outside invaders lead to dire consequences for one troop.

programme.title: E11 - Loners
programme.desc: Sidle up to lone wolf alphas who’d rather go solo. Take a glacial stroll alongside a Galápagos tortoise; dance with venomous European adders; watch a face-tearing battle between Lacerta lizards; and gasp at leopard seals’ amazing stealth attacks.

programme.title: E1 - Battle Lines
programme.desc: As the dry season approaches, tensions rise on Lemur Island, both between rival gangs and within their own ranks. Get a view from the battlefield as the female leaders fiercely defend their turf, while their newborn infants cling to them for safety.

programme.title: E2 - Under Pressure
programme.desc: As food and water become scarce, Crystal, the fierce leader of the Ruins gang, sets her sights on rival Kati’s territory and its neighboring fruit trees. Watch as Crystal’s move and a raid by outside invaders lead to dire consequences for one troop.

programme.title: E3 - Punks on the Run
programme.desc: The lions of the Nomad pride rampage deep into the heart of the MK pride’s territory, scattering its members and coming dangerously close to the five new MK cubs. Meanwhile, the Hollywoods are recovering, and Ava’s survival skills are still intact.

programme.title: E1 - A Capuchin’s Tale
programme.desc: Growing up in the rainforests in the heart of Colombia, a young capuchin monkey has to master his climbing skills, learn how to find food and learn to distinguish friend from foe.

programme.title: E2 - The Hummingbird’s Quest
programme.desc: From Colombia’s high plains of the Páramo to its tropical forests, hummingbirds have evolved into an extraordinary number of species. Whether battling freezing rain or jungle predators, each mother must struggle to build a nest, protect her eggs.

programme.title: E6 - Vancouver Island
programme.desc: Journey to the wild Pacific coast on the western shore of Vancouver Island in British Columbia. From the peaks of mountain glaciers to the canopies of Canada’s only rainforest, nature and human spirit coexist in spectacular habitats.

programme.title: E2 - Rebuilding an Empire
programme.desc: Over the course of recorded time, many species have been threatened with extinction. Once-powerful animal empires – like the dinosaurs - have been completely wiped from the planet. But others once on the verge of disappearance have survived, bounced back, and even reclaimed their kingdoms.

programme.desc: Journey to the wild Pacific coast on the western shore of Vancouver Island in British Columbia. From the peaks of mountain glaciers to the canopies of Canada’s only rainforest, nature and human spirit coexist in spectacular habitats.

programme.title: E2 - Rebuilding an Empire
programme.desc: Over the course of recorded time, many species have been threatened with extinction. Once-powerful animal empires – like the dinosaurs - have been completely wiped from the planet. But others once on the verge of disappearance have survived, bounced back, and even reclaimed their kingdoms.

programme.title: E1 - Battle Lines
programme.desc: As the dry season approaches, tensions rise on Lemur Island, both between rival gangs and within their own ranks. Get a view from the battlefield as the female leaders fiercely defend their turf, while their newborn infants cling to them for safety.

programme.title: E2 - Under Pressure
programme.desc: As food and water become scarce, Crystal, the fierce leader of the Ruins gang, sets her sights on rival Kati’s territory and its neighboring fruit trees. Watch as Crystal’s move and a raid by outside invaders lead to dire consequences for one troop.

programme.title: E2 - Rebuilding an Empire
programme.desc: Over the course of recorded time, many species have been threatened with extinction. Once-powerful animal empires – like the dinosaurs - have been completely wiped from the planet. But others once on the verge of disappearance have survived, bounced back, and even reclaimed their kingdoms.

programme.title: I Love Hong Kong 2013
programme.desc: Hong Kong of the 1970s - a place bustling with opportunities and riches! The earnest Sung befriended the crafty Ha and the latter also helped Song found his first job: a waiter at a Chinese Teahouse. The boss of the Teahouse is a kind man, who has an array of quirky characters as his staff. The colorful characters attracted an interesting patronage, making it a happening place for the community. Fate has it that both Sung and Ha fell for the same girl: May who is from a well-to-do family. It's face off between the geek and the smooth-talker. While romance is blossoming between May and Song, May's best friend Yuen is a gutsy girl who insisted that bad boys are attractive and only have eyes for Ha. Decades past and Sung weathered many changing times: crash of stock market; era of mass-migration and more... While Sung remained steadfast, guarding the teahouse, continuing to serve his loyal patrons and providing jobs for his long-serving staff, the fast-thinking Ha now owns a bu

programme.title: Trapped
programme.desc: The year is 1995. Mangya, a northwestern border town of China has become a ghost town since the once-prosperous mine and border trades shut down. The town has become an island, isolated from the outside world. There is only one police station with three police officers and one gun. XIA Ran, a retired soldier has spent over a decade here. There's a saying that he's the last survivor of the battlefield but he never talk about his story. Sandstorms hit the town once a year, and a catastrophic, once-in-decade sandstorm is forecasted for this year. The storm looms on the horizon; the final transport out of town has long left. In the dead of night, five corpses are tossed into the oil tank in the town's sole gas station. The piercing silence is interrupted by a pack of uninvited guests. However, what frightens XIA Ran more than the murders is that the gas station's tank has been emptied and the town's phone line has been severed. As the sandstorm closes in on Mangya, he realizes th

programme.title: Mad Fate
programme.desc: On a rainy evening, a fortune telling master tries to help a prostitute avert certain death, but fate has plans of its own. He arrives at the prostitute's home just a few minutes too late, watching her take her last breath while Siu Tung stares at her corpse with creepy fascination. When he foretells that Siu Tung will soon commit murder, the Master believes that he has the power to change the inevitable. On the contrary, the veteran detective who once sent Siu Tung to jail for brutally killing a cat believes that Siu Tong is a born psychopath whose bloodthirst cannot be stopped. While Siu Tung becomes increasingly overwhelmed by his insatiable desire for murder, the Master puts his sanity on the line to change the course of fate. But is it possible to defeat the all-powerful force that paves life's path?

programme.title: 12.12: THE DAY
programme.desc: After the assassination of President Park, martial law has been declared. A coup d'etat bursts out by Defense Security Commander CHUN Doo-gwang and a private band of officers following him. Capital Defense Commander LEE Tae-shin, an obstinate soldier who believes the military should not take political actions, fights against CHUN Doo-gwang to stop him. The conflict between the two grows while military leaders are holding their decision and Defense Minister is gone. In the midst of chaos, the spring of Seoul that everyone longed for heads to unexpected direction.

programme.title: Table For Six 2
programme.desc: Belief in our own blessings can bring us good fortune, but what is true fortune? Fortune and misfortune, love and hate, what is their ultimate definitions? One family, three couples, three weddings. After they decided to move on, what further challenges await them? Marriage isn't just about two individuals; it involves a whole family of aunts, uncles, and cousins. Sunny Chan, with his unique sense of humor, once again dives into the complex dynamics of modern society's men and women, families and romance.

programme.title: Infernal Affairs III
programme.desc: Ten months after the murder of Yan (Tony Leung), Ming (Andy Lau) is relegated to the backseat of mundane office work, pending internal investigation. Exhausted mentally and physically, Ming is running on empty, but he is convinced that he can reverse his fortune in no time. Meanwhile, a new star has emerged in the police force. Hardly forty years old, Wing (Leon Lai) has already risen to the top echelon thanks to his illustrious track record...

programme.title: Baogu At the Movie E283 -Cold War 1994
programme.desc: Baogu At The Movie brings you the most exclusive behind the scenes of recent local blockbusters. The most true story and sincere conversation behind every piece of dreamwork.

programme.title: UEFA Champions League Magazine Show 2025/26 E34 -MD17 Preview
UEFA Champions League Magazine Show 2025/26 E34 -MD17 Preview
UEFA Champions League Magazine Show 2025/26 E34 -MD17 Preview
UEFA Champions League Magazine Show 2025/26 E34 -MD17 Preview
UEFA Champions League Magazine Show 2025/26 E34 -MD17 Preview
E1
programme.desc: 講述世界排名第一的拳擊選手李權淑在令全韓國為之瘋狂後突然引退並銷聲匿跡；某一天體育經理人的出現並提出了一個讓她無法拒絕的復出提議，而隨之發生的故事。

programme.title: E13
programme.desc: 二百年後兩個神祕的女人，突然出現在超級富有的丹氏家族，沒人知道她們是誰。但隨後這兩位女子意識到，在前世她們與丹氏家族的每位成員，都有着密不可分的關係。

programme.title: E9
programme.desc: 無論過去、現在、未來，每個別具意義的相遇都造就華麗的日子，且無論什麼人都曾經擁有過華麗的日子。事業、愛情兩得意的能力者李志赫遇上責任感強陽光開朗的咖啡廳經理兼室內設計師池恩悟。兩人儘管外表看似光鮮亮麗，但在經歷人生的低潮後仍守在對方身邊，克服各種試驗，找到人生的真諦。

programme.title: E16
programme.desc: 當紅主播許妍（趙露思飾）和都會精英沈皓明（陳偉霆飾）是一對人人艷羨慕的夫妻，看似十分般配的兩人，由於出生環境的差異，始終難以融入對方的圈子。許妍靠著光鮮的主持人身分和「精心裝點」的身世順利和沈皓明步入婚姻，而這一切盡在沈皓明的掌握下。衝突來臨，許妍脫離沈皓明的掌控一去不回頭。沈皓明卻發現自己早已陷入愛情，想要全力追回許妍。經歷種種，兩人終於撕掉外表的偽裝，重新靠近，會見彼此的內在，也重新認識自己。

programme.desc: 當紅主播許妍（趙露思飾）和都會精英沈皓明（陳偉霆飾）是一對人人艷羨慕的夫妻，看似十分般配的兩人，由於出生環境的差異，始終難以融入對方的圈子。許妍靠著光鮮的主持人身分和「精心裝點」的身世順利和沈皓明步入婚姻，而這一切盡在沈皓明的掌握下。衝突來臨，許妍脫離沈皓明的掌控一去不回頭。沈皓明卻發現自己早已陷入愛情，想要全力追回許妍。經歷種種，兩人終於撕掉外表的偽裝，重新靠近，會見彼此的內在，也重新認識自己。

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE delivers the latest from Japan, Asia, and the rest of the world. While covering wide network of correspondents breaking news and developing stories, offering a perspective from this corner of the globe, a team of trusted anchors ties it all together to give you a picture of what's happening now, and what's ahead.

programme.title: On Tram Tracks Through WrocŁAw - A City In Transition
programme.desc: The best way to appreciate Wrocław is from tram line No. 1. It has been rolling through the city for 140 years - passing rubble, after the war, and past renovated facades, modern apartment blocks and the grassy banks of the River Oder, today.

programme.title: The Sushi Hype - Lifestyle Trend With A Dark Side
programme.desc: Sushi: Once an expensive gourmet food, now a global fast-food phenomenon. Whether you get it from an Asian snack bar or a supermarket to-go box, sushi is trendy. It's low in calories, healthy, and affordable. But sushi consumption also brings problems.

programme.title: E1 - AB制消費觀引熱議
programme.desc: 明星助力官繼續傾情加盟，通過快問快答揭秘明星不為人知的經歷和情感往事，以獨特視角助陣男女嘉賓尋找真愛。以星素之間和代際之間的磁場碰撞，解讀當下年輕人的婚戀觀。

programme.title: E7
programme.desc: 千金小姐林夏不幸被贅婿葉冬設局陷害，不僅失明、父親亦遭毒手。她在重見光明後，看穿了丈夫覬覦家產的邪惡真面目；為了奪回一切並揭開真相，林夏決定改頭換面，以全新身份潛入舊日世界，向渣男與同夥展開一步步毫不留情的復仇。

programme.title: E7
